case_title: FRED ROZENDAL VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROZENDAL, FRED AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROZENDAL, FRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA,INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $14,333.33 PRINCIPAL, $74.61 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,707.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
